items.title: Iran's regime is still intact - the coming days will show if it can hold out
items.dek: Iran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue.
items.body: Iran's surviving leaders are in crisis mode, battling to project security as US and Israel strikes continue.

items.title: Deadly Texas bar shooting is 'potentially an act of terrorism', FBI says
items.dek: Two people were killed and 17 injured, with the suspected gunman also shot dead on the scene.
items.body: Two people were killed and 17 injured, with the suspected gunman also shot dead on the scene.
